styles.body: font-family: 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 10%, #2a0a3d 0%, #0b1020 45%, #061018 100%); padding: 26px; display: flex; justify-content: center; min-height: 300px; align-items: center;
styles.container: background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-radius: 18px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); width: auto; min-width: 450px; overflow: hidden;
styles.th: background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 107, 142, 0.30), rgba(255, 107, 142, 0.10)); color: #ff6b8e; padding: 14px 14px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 15px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
styles.td: background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.10), rgba(255,255,255,0.03)); padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 14px; color: #ffffff; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
styles.title: padding: 18px; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 900; color: #ff6b8e; text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
styles.footer: padding: 12px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.60);

warning.description: 需注意、接近閾值、待觀察
